reason: Establishes the project's ChangeNotifier conventions; the _disposed guard pattern must respect existing notifier lifecycle.
flutter build web is the truth signal; analyze skipped on CJK path.
Pre-modification rule: confirms a one-file _safeNotify is fine here; a shared mixin earns its place only if the pattern recurs in three or more VMs.
Context: the route change that unmasked this latent VM bug. Helps the sub-agent understand why the fix lives in the VM and not in the router.
